ignores.reason: False positive. os.Open/os.ReadFile reads config files whose paths are set at startup from validated env vars or CLI flags. No user-supplied input reaches these call sites.
False positive. Outbound API client calls to Signal service endpoints configured via application config. URLs are not derived from incoming requests or any user input.
False positive. WriteFile uses mode 0600, the correct restrictive permission for config files containing sensitive values. Scanner miscategorisation.
